## Runtime.IChocolateLibraryCreateParams.libraries property

Pre-instantiated [library sources](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iinstantiatedlibrarysource.md)<!-- -->. Used for advanced scenarios like testing or custom library construction. If provided along with other sources, collections are combined.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly libraries?: IInstantiatedLibrarySource;
```
